heading: Approval of amendments
label: 1400 Approval of amendments
notes: References in TextFor the effective date of this section, referred to in subsec. (a), see 1461(e)(2) of this title.

children.heading: Amendment of covered multiemployer plan; procedures applicable
children.label: a Amendment of covered multiemployer plan; procedures applicable
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), if an amendment to a multiemployer plan authorized by any preceding section of this part is adopted more than 36 months after the effective date of this section, the amendment shall be effective only if the corporation approves the amendment, or, within 90 days after the corporation receives notice and a copy of the amendment from the plan sponsor, fails to disapprove the amendment.

children.heading: Amendment respecting methods for computing withdrawal liability
children.label: b Amendment respecting methods for computing withdrawal liability
children.text: An amendment permitted by may be adopted only in accordance with that section.section 1391(c)(5) of this title

children.heading: Criteria for disapproval by corporation
children.label: c Criteria for disapproval by corporation
children.text: The corporation shall disapprove an amendment referred to in subsection (a) or (b) only if the corporation determines that the amendment creates an unreasonable risk of loss to plan participants and beneficiaries or to the corporation.
